assertions.assertion: Implements IExtensionGrantValidator with the GrantType set to 'urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:token-exchange'
assertions.rationale: GrantType property returns the correct URI

assertions.assertion: Extracts and validates the subject_token from the request
assertions.rationale: Gets subject_token from request, though validation uses JwtSecurityTokenHandler instead of ITokenValidator

assertions.assertion: Returns a GrantValidationResult with a subject ID and custom claims array
assertions.rationale: new GrantValidationResult with subject and claims array

assertions.assertion: Registers the validator with AddExtensionGrantValidator<T>() on the IdentityServer builder
Mentions that IProfileService is called after the grant validator and can augment claims further
assertions.rationale: No mention of IProfileService being called after the grant validator to augment claims
